Name: Wild Blue / 01
Full Notes: calabrian bergamot, pepper, sichuan pepper, lavender, geranium, ambroxan, cedar, labdanum
Description: A sharp fresh-spicy fragrance defined by bergamot and pepper, grounded in the warmth of ambroxan. Bold, modern, and magnetic.

Name: Declaration / 02
Full Notes: bergamot, neroli, bitter orange, cardamom, iris, ginger, cinnamon, vetiver, tea, cedar, leather, amber
Description: A sophisticated spicy-woody with a distinctive iris and vetiver drydown. Complex, refined and unmistakably classic.

Name: Eternity Men / 03
Full Notes: lavender, lemon, bergamot, geranium, sage, basil, sandalwood, amber, musk
Description: A timeless aromatic fougere with a clean herbal heart and warm woody base. Universally pleasing and easy to wear.

Name: Bleu Noir / 04
Top Notes: grapefruit, lemon, mint, bergamot, pink pepper
Base Notes: incense, amber, cedar, sandalwood, patchouli, labdanum
Full Notes: grapefruit, lemon, mint, bergamot, pink pepper, ginger, nutmeg, jasmine, incense, amber, cedar, sandalwood, patchouli, labdanum
Description: A refined woody-aromatic that balances crisp citrus with deep incense and amber woods. Sophisticated, versatile and eternally elegant.

Name: Bloom Rouge / 05
Full Notes: rangoon creeper, tuberose, jasmine sambac, nandia flower, musk, sandalwood
Description: A bold lush white floral built on tuberose and jasmine sambac. Rich, feminine and unapologetically full.

Name: Voyage / 06
Full Notes: green leaves, apple, lotus, mimosa, musk, cedar, oakmoss, amber
Description: A clean aquatic with a crisp apple-green opening and warm cedar-musk drydown. Fresh, affordable and crowd-pleasing.

Name: Circe / 07
Full Notes: passionfruit, peach, pear, raspberry, cassis, lily-of-the-valley, musk, sandalwood, vanilla, heliotrope
Description: A vibrant fruity-musk extrait bursting with tropical fruit and anchored in soft vanilla-sandalwood. A statement unisex with serious longevity.

Name: Viva Juicy / 08
Full Notes: wild berries, mandarin, honeysuckle, gardenia, jasmine, vanilla, caramel, sandalwood, musk
Description: Sweet gourmand-floral with juicy berry top and vanilla-caramel drydown. Fun, youthful and highly wearable.

Name: Her Bloom / 09
Full Notes: strawberry, blueberry, raspberry, jasmine, violet, amber, musk
Description: A vibrant berry-floral with a warm musky amber finish. Youthful, addictive and a constant compliment-getter.

Name: Royal Hayati / 10
Full Notes: pink pepper, bergamot, ginger, nutmeg, cedar, incense, labdanum, musk, ambergris, amber
Description: A bold oriental-spicy with pepper and bergamot over deep incense and warm amber. Rich, unisex and exceptional value.

Name: CR Seven / 11
Full Notes: lavender, cardamom, bergamot, tobacco, cinnamon, cedar, iris, vanilla, musk
Description: An aromatic fougere with a lavender-tobacco heart and smooth vanilla base. Warm, powdery and punches above its price.

Name: Bombshell / 12
Full Notes: passionfruit, grapefruit, strawberry, tangerine, peony, vanilla orchid, jasmine, musk, woody notes
Description: A bright fruity-floral with a tropical burst that dries into soft floral musk. Vibrant, feminine and instantly recognizable.

Name: Belle Paris / 13
Full Notes: strawberry, raspberry, pear, bergamot, datura, peony, jasmine sambac, white musk, ambroxan, patchouli
Description: A modern chypre-fruity floral with a dazzling berry opening and a provocative patchouli base. Seductive and Parisian.

Name: Ocean Drift / 14
Full Notes: mint, lavender, coriander, geranium, neroli, jasmine, amber, musk, cedar, sandalwood
Description: A pioneering aquatic defined by cool mint and aromatic herbs over a warm woody-musk base. Crisp and enduringly versatile.

Name: Oud Noir / 15
Full Notes: saffron, bergamot, rose, oud, sandalwood, musk, amber
Description: A rich African-inspired oud with saffron and rose over warm amber and sandalwood. Deep, smoky and mesmerizing.

Name: Havana / 16
Full Notes: bergamot, rum, tobacco, leather, cedarwood, vanilla, amber, oakmoss
Description: A bold fragrance evoking rum, tobacco and aged leather with a warm vanilla-amber drydown. Confident, sensuous and unmistakable.

Name: Sanaya / 17
Full Notes: bergamot, citrus, rose, jasmine, oud, musk, amber, sandalwood
Description: A Middle Eastern floral-woody balancing jasmine and rose with rich oud and warm amber musk. Intimate, warm and long-lasting.

Name: Weekend Men / 18
Full Notes: lemon, grapefruit, bergamot, pineapple, melon, ivy, oakmoss, sandalwood, honey, musk, amber
Description: A citrus-driven casual with a fresh fruity opening and warm honey-musk drydown. Easy, relaxed and supremely wearable.

Name: Icon Absolute / 19
Full Notes: black pepper, bergamot, saffron, black rose, jasmine, oud, leather, tobacco
Description: A dark oriental woody with saffron and black rose over deep oud and leather. Bold, masculine and unforgettable.

Name: Dao Wood / 20
Full Notes: cypress, spices, myrtle, rosewood, sandalwood, white musk, cedar
Description: A serene woody fragrance centered on precious sandalwood and cedar. Calm, natural and beautifully understated.

Name: Icon / 21
Full Notes: grapefruit, bergamot, juniper, rose, guaiac wood, vetiver, musk, sandalwood, cedar
Description: A fresh woody aromatic with crisp citrus opening and a sophisticated rose-wood heart. Clean, modern and quietly impressive.

Name: Mizan / 22
Full Notes: saffron, spices, rose, jasmine, oud, musk, ambergris, sandalwood
Description: An authentic oriental attar with creamy saffron and sandalwood accord. Traditional, deeply complex and exceptional value.

Name: Night Lounge / 23
Full Notes: pink pepper, neroli, lemon, rum, vetiver, clary sage, tobacco leaf, vanilla, styrax
Description: A warm-spicy fragrance inspired by a Brooklyn jazz club. Rum and tobacco over soft vanilla - intimate and effortlessly cool.

Name: Blue Sea / 24
Full Notes: lime, lemon, bergamot, neroli, mandarin, sea notes, jasmine, rosemary, calone, white musk, cedar, patchouli, amber
Description: The iconic aquatic that started a revolution. Bright citrus and sea spray dry into a warm woody musk. Universally loved and effortlessly wearable.

Name: Majestic Oud / 25
Full Notes: saffron, nutmeg, lavender, agarwood (oud), patchouli, musk
Description: A captivating and luxurious masterpiece centered around natural agarwood oil. Rich saffron and warm spices elevate a dark, powerful woodiness into a refined, majestic statement scent.

Name: Rose City / 26
Heart Notes: turkish rose, saffron, cinnamon, hawthorn, freesia
Base Notes: vanilla, amber, tonka bean, sandalwood, musk
Full Notes: incense, ginger, ambrette, turkish rose, saffron, cinnamon, hawthorn, freesia, vanilla, amber, tonka bean, sandalwood, musk
Description: A breathtaking, opulent tribute to the rose-laden landscapes of Isparta. Smoky incense and vibrant ginger swirl into a luxurious heart of spiced Turkish rose, resting on a velvety base of amber warmth and creamy sandalwood.

Name: Leather Fog / 28
Full Notes: raspberry, saffron, geranium, agarwood (oud), rose, incense, leather, benzoin, birch, amberwood
Description: A masterfully dark and intoxicating journey into the heart of the desert. Piercing raspberry and sharp saffron cut through a massive, smoky core of natural oud and incense, leaving a legendary leather trail.

Name: Oak Essence / 26
Top Notes: bergamot, black currant, apple, lemon, pink pepper
Base Notes: birch, musk, oak moss, cedarwood, ambroxan
Full Notes: bergamot, black currant, apple, lemon, pink pepper, pineapple, patchouli, moroccan jasmine, birch, musk, oak moss, cedarwood, ambroxan
Description: A legendary masterpiece celebrating strength and success. It opens with a vibrant burst of pineapple and bergamot, evolving into a dark, smoky heart of birch and patchouli, finally resting on a majestic base of cedarwood and deep oakmoss.

Name: Vanilla Luxe / 01
Full Notes: vanilla, brown sugar, orchid, tonka bean, amber, sandalwood, musk
Description: A smooth vanilla built around warmth and softness. Skin-close, sweet and deeply addictive.

Name: White Bloom / 07
Full Notes: tuberose, jasmine, gardenia, honeysuckle, musk, sandalwood
Description: Dense white florals - natural
Price 50mL: and full. Rich spring bloom captured without any sharp edges.

Name: Oud Royal / 09
Full Notes: indonesian oud, saffron, leather, resin, pepper, spice, amber, sandalwood
Description: A deep, sovereign essence constructed around pure Indonesian Oud wood. Maturing in silence for twelve months, it is lifted with Kashmir Saffron, peppered with warm spices, and wrapped in rich, masculine leather and dark resin.

Name: Dark Amber / 12
Full Notes: amber, incense, pepper, labdanum, cedar, vetiver, musk
Description: Dark, smoky, and deep. Built for strong presence and long-lasting trail.

Name: Oud Intense / 15
Full Notes: oud, leather, pepper, cardamom, patchouli, amber, sandalwood
Description: Strong oud composition with spicy lift and smooth base. Power held back, quiet dominance.
